title: melica fugax var. macbridei
intro: Melica fugax var. macbridei is a variety of the Melica fugax grass, a type of wild grass native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly by the indigenous people of the region, where it is valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Melica fugax var. macbridei can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
